title: EB and CC have update - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will be displayed
scenario: After triggering DFU for Earbuds, returning to the device home screen shows a popup informing the user that Lens Desktop needs to update the Charge Case.
steps: 1. Ensure both Earbuds (EB) and Charge Case (CC) are connected.
2. Trigger the DFU (Device Firmware Update) for the Earbuds successfully.
3. Return to the device home screen.
4. Observe the popup displayed on the home screen.
expected: A popup should appear informing the user that Lens Desktop needs to update the Charge Case.
